howWeWork.title: How We Work
howWeWork.subtitle: We have built a transparent and clear system of cooperation so that you understand in advance the stages of work, the scope of services, and their cost.

steps.title: Initial Consultation
steps.description: The first step is getting acquainted and assessing your situation. The consultation is free and necessary to understand:
points: whether we can be of help to you
which country is better suited for your case
which medical field your request belongs to
steps.note: Before the consultation, please prepare any medical documents if examinations have been previously conducted (tests, MRI, CT, discharge summaries, doctor's conclusions, etc.). If no examinations have been done — nothing extra needs to be prepared.
steps.result: Following the consultation, you receive a general understanding of a possible treatment strategy.

steps.title: Professional Doctor Selection & Treatment Organization
steps.description: If we continue working together, the professional medical support stage begins. At this stage we:
points: conduct a detailed analysis of your case
remain in contact with you throughout the treatment
support the process until the medical stage is complete

pricingTiers.label: Standard case
pricingTiers.note: dentistry, hair transplant, standard plastic surgery, and other typical requests

pricingTiers.label: Complex medical case
pricingTiers.note: ophthalmology, IVF, oncology, repeat surgeries, multiple specialists, non-standard diagnoses

steps.pricingFootnote: Category is determined after the initial consultation.

steps.title: Personal Accompaniment
steps.description: If you need my personal presence during treatment, this service is paid separately. It includes:
points: helping communicate with the medical team

importantItems: We only work with verified clinics and specialists.
Each medical center undergoes preliminary verification of documents, licenses, and cooperation terms.
An official partnership agreement is signed after verification.
Our goal is not just to organize the trip, but to ensure a safe and professional medical process.

stats.qualityStandards: All partners meet strict quality standards

faq.title: FAQs
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about working with TrustMedX, organizing treatment abroad, and patient support.

questions.question: Who is TrustMedX?
questions.answer: TrustMedX is an independent company that helps patients organize treatment abroad. We accompany patients at all stages: from selecting a clinic and doctor to treatment and support after returning home.

questions.question: Are you a clinic or an intermediary?
questions.answer: We are not a clinic and do not provide medical services. TrustMedX is an independent party that helps patients structure the treatment process and interacts directly with clinics.

questions.question: Which clinics and doctors do you work with?
questions.answer: We only partner with clinics and doctors that meet our internal requirements. Before starting cooperation, we conduct our own verification of clinics and specialists. In the selection process, we evaluate: valid licenses and permits, real clinical experience of doctors, reputation of the clinic and specialists in the professional community, quality of medical infrastructure and patient conditions, confirmed clinical cases and results. We personally visit clinics, meet doctors and teams, assess process organization and approach to working with patients.

questions.question: What is TrustMedX's role in the treatment process?
questions.answer: Medical decisions are made by doctors. TrustMedX is responsible for organization, coordination, and communication between the patient and the clinic at all stages of treatment.

questions.question: Do you stay in touch if difficulties arise?
questions.answer: Yes. We stay in touch with the patient even after treatment is completed or upon returning home, helping with further communication with the clinic if necessary.

questions.question: How does working with TrustMedX begin?
questions.answer: Work begins with an initial inquiry. We clarify the patient's request, medical information, and expectations, after which we offer possible treatment options.

questions.question: Do I need to make a decision right away?
questions.answer: No. The patient first receives all necessary information and recommendations. A decision is made only after fully understanding the process, conditions, and timelines.

questions.question: What does the process look like step by step?
questions.answer: Inquiry → situation analysis → clinic and doctor selection → treatment plan approval → trip organization → treatment → support after return.

questions.question: How long does treatment preparation take?
questions.answer: Timelines depend on the treatment direction and country. On average, preparation takes from a few days to several weeks.

questions.question: Who accompanies the patient on-site?
questions.answer: Depending on the country and clinic, the patient is provided with a coordinator, translator, or medical curator. The patient is not left alone at the clinic.

questions.question: What principle is used to select the treatment country?
questions.answer: Country selection is based on medical indications, procedure specifics, doctors' experience, and patient expectations. We don't offer universal solutions.

questions.question: Can I consider several options?
questions.answer: Yes. We can offer and compare several countries, clinics, or approaches so the patient can make an informed decision.

questions.question: Can I choose a specific doctor or clinic?
questions.answer: Yes. If the patient has preferences, we take them into account and work with the chosen clinic provided it meets quality standards.

questions.question: What if the patient doesn't understand medical nuances?
questions.answer: We explain possible options in simple and clear language, helping to understand without pressure or rush.

questions.question: Can TrustMedX refuse to conduct a procedure?
questions.answer: Yes. If a procedure is not recommended based on medical indications or carries increased risks, we will not offer it.

questions.question: How is the cost of treatment determined?
questions.answer: Treatment cost is determined by the clinic and depends on the procedure, doctor, scope of medical services, and treatment country. TrustMedX provides the patient with confirmed information about the cost and its structure in advance.

questions.question: When does payment occur?
questions.answer: Treatment payment is made directly upon the patient's arrival at the clinic and is paid directly to the clinic. Before this, the patient receives an agreed treatment plan, confirmed cost, conditions, and timelines — without advance payments. TrustMedX does not accept payment for medical services and does not participate in financial transactions between the patient and the clinic.

questions.question: Can there be additional expenses?
questions.answer: In some cases, additional expenses not included in the base cost are possible (for example, additional examinations or individual medical prescriptions). Patients are informed about such moments in advance.

questions.question: Does TrustMedX charge a commission from the patient?
questions.answer: TrustMedX's working format depends on the direction and clinic. All financial terms are transparent and discussed with the patient in advance. There are no hidden payments.

questions.question: Will treatment through TrustMedX be more expensive than direct clinic contact?
questions.answer: No. TrustMedX cooperates with clinics directly and works on agreed terms. Treatment cost for the patient is not higher than when independently contacting the clinic. In some cases, clinics provide special conditions for TrustMedX patients. The final cost is confirmed by the clinic in advance and does not change upon arrival.

questions.question: Can treatment results be guaranteed?
questions.answer: Medicine does not assume absolute guarantees. Doctors give prognoses based on medical data and experience, and TrustMedX helps form realistic expectations.

questions.question: What if the result doesn't meet expectations?
questions.answer: In case of questions or doubts, we help organize communication with the clinic and doctor to discuss further steps.

questions.question: Who is responsible for the medical result?
questions.answer: Responsibility for treatment and medical decisions lies with the clinic and attending physician. TrustMedX provides support and communication.

questions.question: What happens after the patient returns home?
questions.answer: We stay in touch and help with doctor's recommendations and further communication with the clinic if necessary.

questions.question: How long does post-operative support last?
questions.answer: Support duration depends on the procedure and individual patient situation and is discussed separately.

questions.question: What is TrustMedX's main value for the patient?
questions.answer: We help patients undergo treatment abroad calmly, clearly, and without unnecessary stress.

questions.question: What approach does TrustMedX use in working with patients?
questions.answer: We work without pressure and imposing decisions, respecting the patient's right to informed choice.

questions.question: How does support through TrustMedX differ from self-organizing treatment?
questions.answer: The patient receives comprehensive support: TrustMedX takes on all communication with the clinic and doctors, directly reaches the necessary specialists within the clinic, asks all medical and organizational questions, coordinates the treatment and stay process, and helps solve emerging questions and situations. By contacting TrustMedX, the patient interacts with one person (curator) rather than searching for contacts and responsible persons within the clinic independently.

questions.question: Why do patients trust TrustMedX?
questions.answer: Because we structure work so that the patient understands what is happening at each stage and feels supported during treatment abroad. We don't offer universal solutions and don't rush the choice. We explain possible options, risks, and limitations, help ask the right questions to the clinic and doctor, and accompany the patient before and after treatment. For us, it's important not just to organize treatment, but to go through the entire journey with the patient — calmly, consistently, and with responsibility for the process.

items.name: Maria Ivanova
items.text: TrustMedX helped me organize treatment in Turkey. Everything went perfectly - from the first consultation to returning home. Professional team that truly cares about their patients!

items.name: Ahmed Al-Rashid
items.text: Excellent service! They handled everything professionally and made the entire treatment process smooth and stress-free. Highly recommend!

items.name: Elena Schmidt
items.text: Very satisfied with the support provided throughout my medical journey in China. The team was always available to answer questions. Felt completely safe.

items.name: John Smith
items.text: Good service, everything went smoothly. Minor delays with documents, but they resolved everything quickly. Surgery was successful.

items.name: Sarah Johnson
items.text: Incredibly grateful! They helped organize a complex surgery in Turkey. Constant support, attention to detail. They continue to help with consultations after returning.

items.name: David Lee
items.text: Treatment in Korea exceeded all expectations. TrustMedX organized everything perfectly - from visa to rehabilitation. True professionals!

mission.title: TrustMedX
mission.subtitle: Your Trusted Partner in Medical Tourism
mission.intro: TrustMedX is an international medical tourism company that has been professionally supporting patients on their journey to quality and safe treatment abroad for over 10 years.
mission.description: We work with verified clinics and doctors in Turkey and other countries, helping patients gain access to modern medical technologies, high-quality service, and transparent treatment organization.
mission.paragraph1: Over the years, we have built a reliable system of interaction with medical institutions, where each clinic undergoes preliminary verification: from licenses and doctor qualifications to treatment standards and service quality. Only after this do we begin cooperation and sign partnership agreements.
mission.paragraph2: TrustMedX is a team of specialists united by a common goal: to provide patients with confidence, safety, and results. We support patients at all stages—from the initial inquiry and doctor selection to treatment completion and return home.
mission.paragraph3: We work with a wide variety of requests: from dentistry and aesthetic medicine to plastic surgery, ophthalmology, reproductive programs, and other areas where doctor experience, accurate recommendations, and the right clinic choice are especially important.
mission.philosophy: Our philosophy is honesty, transparency, and a personalized approach. We don't sell promises—we build treatment based on medical indications, the real capabilities of clinics, and a clearly structured plan where patient safety and treatment results come first.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose TrustMedX
whyChoose.subtitle: Choosing a medical tourism company is a matter of trust and responsibility. TrustMedX has been supporting patients for over 10 years, providing reliable treatment organization and process control at all stages.

items.title: Experience and Expertise
items.description: We have been working in medical tourism for over 10 years and understand well how to organize treatment safely and effectively, taking into account real medical indications.

items.title: Verified Clinics and Doctors
items.description: We only cooperate with clinics that have undergone preliminary verification. Each recommendation is based on licenses, doctor experience, and compliance with the patient's specific request—we don't refer patients formally or without confidence in the result.

items.title: Individual Approach
items.description: The treatment plan is selected personally, without template solutions, taking into account examinations and patient goals.

items.title: Transparency and Support
items.description: The patient receives complete information about the treatment plan, stages, timelines, and costs in advance. We don't hide details and don't change conditions during the process. We provide support at all stages—from the first inquiry to treatment completion.

items.title: International Format
items.description: We work with patients from different countries and provide multilingual support for comfortable and accurate communication.

founder.title: About the Founder
founder.name: Daria Kodzha
founder.intro: My name is Daria Kodzha, I am the founder and CEO of TrustMedX. I have been working in medical tourism for over 10 years, supporting patients with various medical requests and complexity levels.
founder.story: My decision to dedicate my professional life to medical tourism was not accidental. It became a conscious choice after the personal experience of losing a loved one who did not receive the necessary medical care at the right moment. This experience showed me how critically important timely decisions, the right choice of clinic and doctor, and access to quality medical care are.
founder.motivation: It was then that I realized I wanted to deeply understand this field and dedicate myself to work where every recommendation matters. Since then, I have been systematically studying medical areas, clinics, treatment standards, and organizing work so that patients don't face uncertainty and difficult choices alone.
founder.approach: I personally participate in forming a partner network of clinics and doctors, in developing company work standards, and in supporting complex medical cases. It is fundamentally important to me that every decision is medically sound, transparent, and meets the patient's real needs.
founder.today: Today, TrustMedX is an international team of specialists that I have assembled and am developing as a systematic project. This work for me is not just a profession, but a conscious responsibility and the result of many years of professional journey aimed at ensuring that patients receive help on time, in reliable hands, and with understanding of every treatment stage.
founder.philosophy: We work systematically, transparently, and with a focus on results, building long-term relationships with both patients and medical partners. I sincerely believe that every person deserves timely, quality, and understandable medical care.
